ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "total_n" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents in the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., political, social, economic) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "demographic_label" TEXT /* Label of the demographic group (e.g., All Respondents) */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic group */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the demographic group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series of survey data */,
  "series_date" TEXT /* Date the series was conducted */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "demographic_id" TEXT /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey for the series */,
  "survey_mode" TEXT /* Mode of survey (e.g., online, phone, in-person) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the survey series */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the survey series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_series_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_series_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each response category */,
  "category_label" TEXT /* Label of the response category (e.g., Somewhat Approve) */,
  "category_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the response category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the response category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey series */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the response category */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Number of respondents who selected this category */,
  "response_weight" REAL /* Weight of the response for statistical analysis */,
  "response_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES response_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES survey_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "question_weight" REAL /* Weight of the question for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_responses" (
  "question_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-response relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the response category */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the response */,
  "response_weight" REAL /* Weight of the response for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES response_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the survey */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the survey */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
